cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log. Turn on before reporting bugs.
cfg.npc_collision.name: NPC
cfg.npc_collision.desc: Allow NPCs to block your path. Turn off to walk straight through every NPC instead of nudging around them.
cfg.drop_heavies_away_from_player.name: Drop Heavies Away From Player
cfg.drop_heavies_away_from_player.desc: Logs, stones, and mined blocks land next to the tree or rock instead of flying at your feet.
cfg.heavy_drop_grace_period.name: Heavy Drop Grace Period
cfg.heavy_drop_grace_period.desc: A freshly-dropped log, stone, or block can't push you for a short moment after it lands. You can still push them around afterwards.
cfg.grace_period_seconds.name: Grace Period Seconds
cfg.grace_period_seconds.desc: Seconds before a freshly-dropped log, stone, or block can push you again.
cfg.walk_through_heavy_drops.name: Walk Through Heavy Drops
cfg.walk_through_heavy_drops.desc: Lets you walk through dropped logs, stones, ore and crates instead of bumping into them, and stops big piles of them from sliding into hard-to-reach spots. They can still be picked up.
cfg.include_every_dropped_item.name: Include Every Dropped Item
cfg.include_every_dropped_item.desc: Extends the walk-through to every dropped item, not just heavy ones.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
